Bash(node -e "const p1=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/tmp/p1.json'\)\).prompt; const p2=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/tmp/p2.json'\)\).prompt; const M='\\n---CACHE_BOUNDARY---\\n'; const E='\\n---END_STABLE_RULES---\\n'; const s1=p1.slice\(p1.indexOf\(M\)+M.length, p1.indexOf\(E\)\); const s2=p2.slice\(p2.indexOf\(M\)+M.length, p2.indexOf\(E\)\); console.log\('s1 len:', s1.length\); console.log\('s2 len:', s2.length\); console.log\('equal?', s1===s2\); if\(s1!==s2\){for\(let i=0;i<Math.min\(s1.length,s2.length\);i++\){if\(s1[i]!==s2[i]\){console.log\('diff at',i,'s1=',JSON.stringify\(s1.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-20\),i+40\)\),'s2=',JSON.stringify\(s2.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-20\),i+40\)\)\);break}}}")

Bash(node -e "const p1=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('p1.json'\)\).prompt; const p2=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('p2.json'\)\).prompt; const M='\\n---CACHE_BOUNDARY---\\n'; const E='\\n---END_STABLE_RULES---\\n'; const s1=p1.slice\(p1.indexOf\(M\)+M.length, p1.indexOf\(E\)\); const s2=p2.slice\(p2.indexOf\(M\)+M.length, p2.indexOf\(E\)\); console.log\('s1 len:',s1.length,'s2 len:',s2.length,'equal?',s1===s2\); if\(s1!==s2\){for\(let i=0;i<Math.min\(s1.length,s2.length\);i++\){if\(s1[i]!==s2[i]\){console.log\('diff@',i\); console.log\('s1[',i,']=',JSON.stringify\(s1.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-30\),i+60\)\)\); console.log\('s2[',i,']=',JSON.stringify\(s2.slice\(Math.max\(0,i-30\),i+60\)\)\); break}}}")
